fields.title: Additional Spawn Range
fields.description: Additional random range of entities to spawn, defaults to 0, 0 when not set

fields.title: Entity To Spawn
fields.description: What entity to spawn, defaults to owning entity when not set
Conditions that need to be met for the behavior to start.

fields.title: Domain
fields.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

fields.title: Subject
fields.description: The subject of this filter test.

fields.title: Test
fields.description: The name of the test to apply.

fields.title: Value
fields.description: The value being compared with the test.

fields.title: Inherit Parent Name
fields.description: If true, the entity will inherit the name of the parent entity, defaults to true when not set

fields.title: Spawn Amount
fields.description: How many entities to spawn, defaults to 1 when not set

fields.title: Spawn Method
fields.description: Spawn method. born, spawned, or summoned, defaults to spawned when not set

description: Component for spawning entities when an entity perishes.
title: Entity Spawn On Death
